description: Fifty hand-curated geospatial Q&A queries spanning five archetype shapes, eight place sizes, and ten dataset families. Used by `run-corpus` to measure per-archetype averages and the variance attributable to query phrasing, place size, and dataset choice.

queries.query: Show NO2 over Los Angeles County for 2020
NO2 over Houston for 2021
Display NDVI for Iowa during summer 2022
Sea surface temperature near the Florida Keys in August 2020
Methane over the Permian Basin in 2023
Precipitation over California in winter 2017
Aerosol optical depth over Beijing in November 2020
Sentinel-2 imagery over Maui during the 2023 fires
Snow cover over Colorado in January 2024
Air quality over Mumbai in December 2022

NDVI versus precipitation over Iowa for 2020 versus 2022
SST and chlorophyll near the Gulf Coast in summer 2020
Methane and NO2 over the Permian Basin in 2023
Snow cover and temperature over the Rocky Mountains in 2019 versus 2024
Land cover and NDVI for the Amazon in 2018 versus 2023
Aerosols and precipitation over India during the 2021 monsoon
Wildfire smoke and air quality over Northern California in 2020 versus 2021
Drought index and NDVI over Texas in 2011 versus 2022
Sea ice extent and temperature over the Arctic in 2010 versus 2024
Monthly NO2 over Los Angeles from 2018 through 2023
Annual NDVI over the Sahel from 2010 through 2023
Sea ice extent over the Arctic from 2000 through 2024
